title: OmniFormatter lang-js Configuration Schema
description: Configuration options for the JS/TS/JSX/TSX language module. All fields are optional. Unspecified fields use the module's defaults (Prettier 3.x defaults).

printWidth.description: Maximum line length in display columns. Enforced using Unicode display widths (CJK = 2 columns).

tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indentation level.

useTabs.description: Indent lines with tabs instead of spaces.

semi.description: Add semicolons at the end of statements.

singleQuote.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.

trailingComma.description: Where to add trailing commas. 'all' = ES2017+, 'es5' = ES5-compatible, 'none' = no trailing commas.

mode.description: Module mode. 'opinionated' = Prettier 3.x compat guaranteed. 'advanced' = full option surface, compat voided.
